title: Agreement between Great Britain and Colombia extending the Extradition Treaty of 27 October 1888 to Bechuanaland Protectorate, East Africa Protectorate, Gambia Protectorate, N.E.Rhodesia, N.W.Rhodesia, N.Nigeria, Northern territories of the Gold Coast, Nyasaland, Sierra Leone Protectorate, S.Nigeria Protectorate, S. Rhodesia, Swaziland and the Uganda Protectorate.
subject: EXTRADITION
